_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop a trend analysis and impact report.
reference_document_element_description: Produce regular data quality reports for governance and business stakeholders, including trend analysis, high-impact issue summaries, and remediation progress.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-003 (AB, cosine: 0.459), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.436).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.676). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, impact, trend]. DCWF-only terms [develop, report] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, data, governance, high, issue, produce] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.937, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.069 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop a trend analysis and impact report." and "Produce regular data quality reports for governance and business stakeholders, i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.565 < STS 0.676 (gap -0.110). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [develop, report] and [business, data, governance] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [analysis, impact, trend]. DCWF-only: [develop, report]. WIDAI-only: [business, data, governance, high, issue, produce].
